description_long: This object consists of two DVD box sets stacked together, each featuring cover art from the science fiction series 'The Expanse.' The top box set displays a dramatic illustration of an astronaut in a spacesuit reaching out, with a cosmic background of stars and spacecraft. The cases are rectangular, relatively thin, and have glossy printed covers with vibrant blue, green, and black tones. The spines of both cases are visible, showing the series title and season numbers in bold, white text. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with the cases likely made of plastic and paperboard. The object is compact and lightweight, suitable for carrying or placing on a shelf.
description: A pair of stacked DVD box sets for 'The Expanse,' featuring vivid cover art of an astronaut and cosmic scenery, with glossy, rectangular cases.
description_view_0: Two DVD box sets are stacked, with the top cover art and both spines clearly visible, showing the series title and season numbers.
description_view_1: The front cover of the top box set is most prominent, displaying the astronaut illustration and cosmic background in full detail.
description_view_2: The side of the stacked cases is visible, emphasizing the thinness and the glossy finish of the top cover.
description_view_3: The top cover is seen at an angle, with the lower box set partially visible beneath, highlighting the layered arrangement.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration features a detailed, realistic depiction of an astronaut in a spacesuit reaching out with a gloved hand, set against a dramatic cosmic background with stars and a spacecraft. The style is cinematic and dynamic, with cool blue and green tones dominating the scene.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are black with bold, white text oriented horizontally, displaying the series title and season numbers. Minimal decorative elements are present, giving a clean and modern look.
attribute_publisher_logo: A small, white logo with the word 'Syfy' is visible in the lower right corner of the front cover and on the spine.
